issues.description: Counter effect is incomplete. Missing optional cost structure: 'You may trash 1 card from your hand' should make the entire effect conditional on paying this cost, not execute unconditionally.
TrashFromHand should be a cost (optional), not an action. Counter effects with optional costs need cost parameter structure.
Keyword 'Banish' is incorrect. Card text says 'cannot be K.O.'d during this battle' which should use keyword 'CannotBeKOd' or equivalent protection, not Banish.
Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and KO action is completely unrelated to card text. Card only has one effect (Counter protection). This second effect should be removed entirely.
